relatedBlades.copy:
Cloudflare vs. Zscaler Competitive Performance Assessment

Cloudflare proved overall better ZTNA and RBI performance compared to Zscaler

![[ACQ] Q1'23 EM - NAMER - Miercom Report Cloudflare vs Zscaler ZPA LP - ZTNAP95 Image](//cf-assets.www.cloudflare.com/slt3lc6tev37/5P8plmYqm4XSNtIGPqX5gP/e0db419fd0fa1eaa90dbfabe587504d5/ZTNAP95.png) Zero Trust providers' network architecture and performance have an impact on organizations' end user experience. A faster Zero Trust network speed keeps teams productive while still implementing continuous, contextual verification and other security best practices. Cloudflare commissioned Miercom to competitively examine the performance of Cloudflare and Zscaler Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA) and Remote Browser Isolation (RBI) products, in addition to their underlying global networks. In the testing, Miercom observed that: - Cloudflare proves 38% better ZTNA performance compared to Zscaler for all domestic and international testing locations combined - Cloudflare proves twice as fast average ZTNA response time compared to Zscaler for international locations - Cloudflare proves 45% better RBI performance compared to Zscaler for all domestic and international testing locations combined Read the full report for a detailed breakdown of the testing methodology and results.
